Vesk.name: 维斯克蜥人 Vesk
Vesk.description:
维斯克蜥人是一个好战的爬行类种族，在发展出太空航行能力后不久便征服了其恒星系中的八个世界，建立了维斯卡里姆帝国。维斯克蜥人往往拥抱冲突，并尊重力量与军事武力。

Vesk are a warmongering, reptilian people who conquered the eight worlds in their solar system shortly after they developed spaceflight, forming the Veskarium empire. Vesk tend to embrace conflict and respect strength and military might.

Skittermander.name: 斯基特曼德人 Skittermander
Skittermander.description:
掠跃曼德是一种精力充沛、长着六条手臂的人形生物，拥有色彩鲜艳的毛发。掠跃曼德以混乱而热情的方式完成任务，通常也乐于团队合作，甚至能通过协作反抗那些企图征服他们的人。

Skittermanders are energetic, six-armed humanoids with brightly colored fur. Skittermanders accomplish tasks with chaotic enthusiasm and typically enjoy teamwork, defying even their would-be conquerors through collaboration.

Kalo.name: 卡洛 Kalo
Kalo.description:
卡洛鱼人来自环绕布雷瑟达运行的一颗水世界卫星。这些水栖类人生物将艺术与创造力视为其文化核心，并在战斗中运用如流水般灵动的战斗风格。

Kalos hail from a watery moon orbiting Bretheda. These aquatic humanoids have art and creativity at the center of their culture, and they employ fluid fighting styles in combat.

Astrazoan.name: 阿斯特拉佐安 Astrazoan
Astrazoan.description:
星变体没有明确的起源，也没有已知的母星。他们可塑的身体隐藏着一种奇特的天然形态，而他们很少向任何人展露这一形态。但通过改变自己的身体以适应新的情况，星变体在银河系多样文化之中，找到了如同他们身份一样多的归宿。

Astrazoans have no clear origins or known home world. Their malleable bodies hide a peculiar natural shape they rarely show to anyone. But by changing their bodies to adapt to new situations, astrazoans have found as many homes as they have identities among the varied cultures of the galaxy.

Barathu.name: 飞螅族 Barathu
Barathu.description:
飞螅族是漂浮的生物，拥有奇异的身体形态，进化自气态巨行星布雷瑟达。飞螅族会凭本能并随心所欲地改写自己的基因编码，将自己的身体塑造成令人惊叹、千姿百态的独特形态。

Barathus are floating beings with bizarre body shapes who evolved on the gas giant Bretheda. Barathus rewrite their own genetic code instinctively and at will, shaping their bodies into a stunning array of unique forms.

Pahtra.name: 帕赫特拉 Pahtra
Pahtra.description:
帕赫特拉人是来自附近恒星系的一种类人猫科物种。他们极具竞争心，并以在魔法、音乐和战争方面的成就而闻名。他们的母星最近从维斯卡里姆的占领下获得解放，并已加入协约世界。

Pahtras are a humanoid feline species from a nearby star system. They're highly competitive and known for their achievements in magic, music, and war. Their home world was recently freed from the Veskarium's occupation, and they've joined the Pact Worlds.

Khizar.name: 奇扎尔 Khizar
Khizar.description:
基扎尔是具有智慧的植物，与自然和谐共生，并学会了与其他生物进行心灵感应交流。

Khizars are intelligent plants who live in harmony with nature and have learned to communicate telepathically with other creatures.

Shobhad.name: 肖巴德 Shobhad
Shobhad.description:
肖巴德人，或者用他们对自身族群的统称 shobhad-neh 来说，是阿基顿星球的原生游牧民族。尽管其他物种猜测肖巴德人可能是位面旅行者的后裔，甚至是另一物种的突变后代，但肖巴德人知道，他们自古以来就是阿基顿的一部分。这些巨大的四臂类人生物视自己为阿基顿最初的子嗣，并在其表面进行着一场持续数千年的漫游。

Shobhads, or shobhad-neh as they refer to themselves collectively, are nomadic people native to the planet Akiton. Though other species speculate shobhads might be descendants of planar travelers or even mutant offspring of another species, shobhads know they've been part of Akiton forever. These enormous four-armed humanoids see themselves as Akiton's original children and wander its surface in a millennia-long journey.

Shirren.name: 希灵尼斯人 Shirren
Shirren.description:
昆虫般的虫族夏伦人脱离了毁灭性的虫群，抛弃了冷酷无情的蜂巢思维，以追求个人自由并终结星际暴力的循环。夏伦人是一个心灵感应物种，致力于自身的个体主义，建立自己选择的社群，并与其他族群和谐共处。

The insectile shirrens split from the destructive Swarm, forsaking the ruthless hive mind to pursue personal freedom and end the cycl e of interstellar violence. Shirrens are a species of telepaths devoted to their own individualism, building chosen communities, and living in harmony with other peoples.

Android.name: 仿生人 Android
Android.description:
安卓体最初作为合成人造生命，由银河中许多技术先进的文明创造出来。最早的安卓体是由类人生物依照自身形象制造的，但在赋予这些活体构装生命的技术传播开来之后，安卓体开始展现出惊人的形态多样性。协约世界中的安卓体最初被设计为仆役，但如今，安卓体和其他机器人生命在《协约》之下，与有机裔族平等并立。一些安卓体建立了自己的独立社群，而大多数则无缝融入协约世界社会。与许多其他技术构装不同，安卓体并不只是精密的合成器官和复杂程序；每一个安卓体都拥有属于自己的灵魂。

Androids first emerged as synthetic beings crafted by many technologically advanced civilizations throughout the galaxy. The first androids were created by humanoid peoples in their own images, but after the technology that animated the living constructs spread, androids began displaying a fantastic diversity of forms. Androids in the Pact Worlds were originally designed as servants, but today androids and other robotic beings stand as equals to organic ancestries under the Pact. Some androids have formed their own independent communities, while most integrate seamlessly into Pact Worlds societies. Unlike many other technological constructs, androids are more than intricate synthetic organs and complex programming, and each possesses their own soul.

Kasatha.name: 卡萨萨尼斯人 Kasatha
Kasatha.description:
卡萨斯人深受其遥远故乡古老传统的熏陶；那颗故乡星球环绕着一颗正在走向死亡的恒星运行。卡萨斯人是四臂类人生物，他们乘坐一艘名为伊达里号的巨型世界飞船来到协约世界。在万事万物中奋力追求太空的平衡，卡萨斯人以能用祖先的智慧来节制自身的科技进步为荣。

Steeped in the ancient traditions of a distant home world orbiting a dying star, kasathas are four-armed humanoids who arrived in the Pact Worlds aboard a massive worldship named Idari. Striving for cosmic balance in all things, kasathas take pride in tempering their technological advances with the wisdom of their ancestors.

Ikeshti.name: 异客蜥人 Ikeshti
Ikeshti.description:
异客蜥人是聪慧的双足蜥蜴，长着坚硬的红色鳞片，体格紧凑。他们原产于环境严酷的星球阿基顿，坚韧、坚定且充满热情，为了自己及其紧密团结的社群的生存而不懈努力。许多人天生擅长发明创造，并乐于为旧物或损坏的物品发掘新的用途。

Ikeshtis are intelligent bipedal lizards with hard red scales and a compact build. Native to the harsh planet of Akiton, they're hardy, resolute, and passionate, working ceaselessly for the survival of themselves and their tight-knit communities. Many have a knack for invention and enjoy finding new purposes for old or damaged objects.

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.description:
人类以其在最具挑战性的处境中适应并蓬勃发展的能力而闻名，这其中也包括他们母星戈拉里昂的神秘消失。人类雄心勃勃、富有创造力，而且有着无穷无尽的好奇心，因此在人类在银河系中始终保持着强大的存在感，常常担任领导职位，或活跃于探索的最前沿。几乎任何地方都能发现人类的身影，他们几乎什么事都在做。

Humans are known for their ability to adapt and thrive in the most challenging situations, including the mysterious loss of their home world, Golarion. Ambitious, creative, and endlessly curious, humans maintain a robust presence in the galaxy, often taking on positions of leadership or acting at the forefront of exploration. Humans can be found almost anywhere, doing almost anything.

Contemplative.name: 默思族 Contemplative
Contemplative.description:
经过无数代对精神自我完善的追求所塑造，默思族拥有巨大的大脑，同样擅长数学与魔法。他们与生俱来的念动力推动他们在空中移动，而他们审慎的好奇心则驱使他们走向发现与创新。

Shaped by countless generations' pursuit of mental self-perfection, contemplatives have huge brains equally suited to math and magic. Their natural telekinesis propels them through the air as their measured curiosity drives them to discovery and innovation.

Ysoki.name: 伊索基 Ysoki
Ysoki.description:
鼠族曾被称为ratfolk，机敏而灵活。他们的根源遍及无数世界，常与体型更大的物种并肩合作，帮助建立社群并完成艰巨任务。无论是最拥挤的人群，还是最狭窄的隧道，鼠族总知道该如何找到自己的路。

Once known as ratfolk, ysoki are clever and flexible. With roots on countless worlds, ysoki work alongside larger species, helping to establish communities and accomplish tough tasks. From the largest of crowds to the tightest of tunnels, a ysoki always knows how to find their way.

Elebrian.name: 灵脑人 Elebrian
Elebrian.description:
灵脑人是头颅增大并具有先天魔法天赋的人形生物。虽然在一场大灾变蹂躏他们的星球之前，他们原本是伊奥克斯上的主导物种，但如今只有少数灵脑人仍存活于与世隔绝的地堡社群中，或作为企业设施中的活体娱乐品。

Elebrians are humanoids with enlarged craniums and innate magical aptitude. While they were originally the dominant species on Eox before a cataclysm ravaged their planet, only a few elebrians survive in isolated bunker communities or as living entertainment in corporate facilities.

Lashunta.name: 拉申塔人 Lashunta
Lashunta.description:
很久以前，拉申塔人在故乡卡斯卓韦上进化出了灵能能力和一种独特的二型性，帮助他们得以生存。到了现代，拉申塔人在青春期会操纵自身的基因，使每个个体都能成长为强化的学者或战士，尽管并非每个拉申塔人都会选择这些传统道路。

Long ago, lashuntas evolved psychic abilities and a unique dimorphism that helped them survive on their home world of Castrovel. In modern times, lashuntas manipulate their own genetics at puberty, allowing each individual to develop into an enhanced scholar or warrior, though not every lashunta commits to these traditional choices.

Sarcesian.name: 萨瑟蝶人 Sarcesian
Sarcesian.description:
萨瑟蝶人是天生的太空旅行者，凭借由能量与光构成的蝴蝶翅膀在太空的虚空中滑翔。

Sarcesians are natural spacefarers who glide through the void of space on butterfly wings of energy and light.

Dragonkin.name: 龙人 Dragonkin
Dragonkin.description:
龙人在外貌上具有龙类特征且极其忠诚，是具有深切共情能力的生物，能够与另一名生物形成近乎牢不可破的精神纽带，并由此显现出心灵感应交流与战术协同。

Draconic in appearance and fiercely loyal, dragonkin are deeply empathic beings capable of forming a nearly unbreakable spiritual bond with one other creature, which manifests in telepathic communication and tactical synergy.

Vlaka.name: 弗拉卡 Vlaka
Vlaka.description:
弗拉卡斯是狼一般的游牧民族，它们浓密的皮毛帮助它们在严寒中生存，正如它们的母星拉约克上一样。它们拥有惊人的嗅觉，而且常常天生耳聋、失明，或又聋又盲。

Vlakas are wolflike nomads whose thick fur coats help them survive in the frigid cold, as it is on their home world of Lajok. They have an incredible sense of smell and are often born deaf, blind, or deafblind.
